creator: solidwarea@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Bjoern A. Zeeb from comment #1)

Thanks for you reply.
I'd gladly send you over any relevant information.
Before I do, since this is regarding Wi-Fi, is there any information that the error message and "-ddd" might include that I should censor for the sake of my privacy? I'm asking this since it doesn't seem possible to edit/delete comments/reports here in case I do accidentally include information that shouldn't be disclosed.

Since it isn't possible to actively run FreeBSD on my SSD when I can't use it, my testing is limited for times I try to set it up. Would trying to get the Wi-Fi working on the live bootable drive suffice for debugging instead?

If I happen to forget to add some relevant context or information here, I have also discussed this in the FreeBSD forums. If you're interested in checking that out, here: https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/wireless-network-issues-on-freebsd-release-14-2-rtw880.95959/#post-682176
